name: admin-flow-platform
description: Modular admin flow platform with React, Node.js gateway, FastAPI modules, and PostgreSQL.

scripts.build: npm --workspace apps/web run build && npm --workspace apps/gateway run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace apps/web run lint && npm --workspace apps/gateway run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace apps/web run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/gateway run typecheck
